description: Update Strata website with real portfolio, fix contact form, deploy to Vercel

userStories.title: Verify portfolio has real project data
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to see real project case studies on the Strata website.
acceptanceCriteria: Portfolio.js contains entries for: G-Rump, AEON, Driftlands (at minimum)
Each entry has: title, description, tech stack, and URL (or 'In Development' note)
AEON and Driftlands entries have accurate descriptions matching their current state
No placeholder lorem ipsum text in any portfolio entry
userStories.notes: Agent found Portfolio.js already has G-Rump, AEON, Driftlands, FairTradeWorker, Life Balance Oxford, Ole Miss 365. Verify accuracy.

userStories.title: Fix contact form or replace with direct email link
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want to actually contact Strata through the website.
acceptanceCriteria: Contact form submits successfully OR is replaced with a mailto: link
If form: verify REACT_APP_CONTACT_API_URL env var is documented
If mailto: use a professional email address
userStories.notes: Contact form exists with proper logic. May need API endpoint configured or fallback to mailto.

userStories.title: Replace any remaining href='#' placeholder links
userStories.description: As a visitor, I want all links to go somewhere real.
acceptanceCriteria: Search entire codebase for href='#' or href="#"
Replace each with either a real URL, a React Router Link, or remove the element
No dead links remain in navigation, footer, or CTAs
userStories.notes: Agent found the site uses real React Router Links, not placeholders. Verify thoroughly.

userStories.title: Build and deploy to Vercel
userStories.description: As a business owner, I want the Strata website live with my real portfolio.
acceptanceCriteria: Run npm install && npm run build — build completes without errors
Live URL is accessible and portfolio renders correctly
userStories.notes: React CRA app. Has vercel.json already.
